_description: Source of truth for Peter's actual positions. Edited by Claude on user request, committed to the Munger Claw dashboard repo. Overrides the dashboard's localStorage actuals on every page load.
_how_to_update: Ask Claude in chat: 'I bought 50 NVDA at 201.30 today' or 'Sold half my HYPE at 58'. Claude edits this file, commits, and pushes.

positions.notes: Apr 22 earnings playbook deployment. Promoted from watchlist to model on user request.

history.note: Positions seeded from model portfolio at inception.

Peter reported actual fills. Replaced seed numbers with real fills: HYPE 62.724@44.11, NVDA 10@200, PLTR 12.349@145.76, VVV 110.762@8.92, OKLO 15@65, RCAT 39@12.82, TSLA 2.49@371.53. Total deployed ~$9,955. TSLA promoted from watchlist to model.
